meaning: n.斯泰森毡帽(一种阔边高顶毡帽),(牛仔戴的)宽边帽
examples: There I saw one I knew, and stopped him, crying Stetson !
There I saw one I knew, and stopped him, crying "Stetson!"
Rebuilding, with the arrival of Big Oil in his stetson and size thirteens, has shaped the modern metropolis.
This include Bernie Ebbers, WorldCom's founder, who was often to be seen in his cowboy boots and stetson hat.
Wayne Bailey, a political-science professor at Stetson University in DeLand, the county seat.
